title: vitis longii var. microsperma
intro: Vitis longii var. microsperma is a variety of grapevine native to China, also known as Chinese wild grape. The medicinal properties of Vitis longii var. microsperma include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Vitis longii var. microsperma include improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting immune function. Vitis longii var. microsperma can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
